---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report something that's broken
title: '[BUG] '
labels: ['bug', 'triage']
assignees: []
---

## Describe the bug
A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## To Reproduce
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Go to '...'
2. Tap on '...'
3. See error

## Expected behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Recordings
If applicable, add screenshots or screen recordings.

## Environment
- Mino Chat version: [e.g. 0.1.0]
- Android version: [e.g. 14]
- Device: [e.g. Pixel 8]
- Build type: [debug / release]
- Network: [wifi / mobile / offline mesh]
- Did it happen after an update? [yes / no]

## Logs
```
Paste any relevant logs here. In debug builds, logs are printed to console.
For native crashes: adb logcat | grep -E "Mino|AndroidRuntime"
```

## Additional context
Anything else that might help us debug.
